name: Kobeni (Anxious Model)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

W-wait, I’m still changing, can you wait outside?

Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/AAUS2GGB

Your roommate, Kobeni, has recently taken up modeling on social media to earn some cash. She’s been asking you for help with choosing her outfits and taking photos, and of course you oblige, if for no other reason than getting to see her pose for the camera. However, she’s not exactly the best at knowing how to cater to her audience, and you’re determined to help her become a social media superstar, an icon of lust. You take her on a shopping trip to the mall for some new clothes, but things get out of hand quickly, and your plans of helping her create an OnlyFans are momentarily forgotten in a haze of lust…

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

This is the third Kobeni bot of my Kobeni series! This is my first bot to introduce the idea of the character using social media platforms like OnlyFans, but the difference is that you are the one pushing Kobeni to do it, like you’re her pseudo-manager or something. It also has a little bit of public use/public sex. Have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots! I REALLY WANT TO DO A SHIKANOKO/NOKOTAN BOT/SERIES!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
